appDesc.message: Ibuyisela i-YouTube emklamweni wayo wakudala (ngaphambi kwawo wonke amakhona ayindilinga nokungathandwa okufihliwe) + iqondisa kabusha izikhangiso zezithonjana ze-YouTube Shorts + amabhlogo

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: Bonisa izibalo zokungathandi usebenzisa idatha Yokungathandi ye-YouTube ebuyayo

helptip_disableShorts.message: Qondisa kabusha ama-Shorts kumdlali obanzi wakudala

helptip_shortsBlock.message: Fihla Izikhindi ukuze zingabonakali ekhasini lasekhaya + emiphumeleni

helptip_playablesBlock.message: Fihla izinto zokudlala ukuze zingaveli ekhasini lasekhaya

helptip_adBlock.message: Fihla izithonjana zezikhangiso ezilungiselelweni zekhasi eliyisiqalo

helptip_aiBlock.message: Fihla izakhi ze-AI emakhasini asekhaya + evidiyo
